heroDescription: Explore Kling video generation models on Novita AI, including text-to-video and image-to-video variants for cinematic short-form video workflows.
seoDescription: Explore Kling AI models on Novita AI. Compare Kling text-to-video and image-to-video variants, model pages, API access, and pricing signals for production video generation.
overviewBody: Kling is a video generation model family developed by Kuaishou for creating short cinematic clips from text prompts, source images, and guided visual references. The family is widely used for text-to-video and image-to-video workflows where motion quality, prompt alignment, subject consistency, and realistic physics matter.

On Novita AI, this collection page organizes the available Kling model variants into a single SEO-friendly model hub. Each card links to a dedicated model page where developers can review API behavior, pricing, and playground access before integrating the model into a production workflow.
Use this page to compare Kling versions, generation modes, and model-page entry points without scanning the full model library.

capabilities.title: Cinematic video generation
capabilities.description: Generate short video clips with natural camera motion, visual coherence, and production-oriented motion quality.

capabilities.title: Text-to-video and image-to-video workflows
capabilities.description: Use Kling variants for prompt-only generation, image animation, and controlled creative iteration from visual references.

capabilities.title: Versioned model lineup
capabilities.description: Compare Kling 2.x and 1.x variants by generation mode, quality tier, and model page availability.

capabilities.title: API-first integration
capabilities.description: Open an individual Kling model page for REST API examples, pricing details, and playground testing.

lineupSections.title: Kling 2.x Series
lineupSections.description: Kling 2.x models focus on higher-fidelity motion, stronger prompt interpretation, and more production-ready text-to-video and image-to-video generation.
items: Use Kling 2.1 and 2.1 Master when visual fidelity and cinematic motion are the priority.
Use Kling 2.0 variants for established text-to-video and image-to-video pipelines.
Open the model page for each variant to confirm supported parameters, pricing, and playground behavior.

lineupSections.title: Kling 1.x Series
lineupSections.description: Kling 1.x models remain useful for stable image-to-video and text-to-video workflows where compatibility and predictable output are more important than the newest feature set.
items: Useful for baseline Kling generation workflows and comparison against newer 2.x models.
Best for teams that already have prompts, assets, or evaluations built around earlier Kling behavior.

faq.question: What Kling models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The collection page lists enabled Kling variants from Novita AI model configuration and links each model to its dedicated model page.

faq.question: Can I use Kling through an API?
faq.answer: Yes. Open an individual Kling model page to review API examples, pricing, and Playground access.
